user.title: Karlstadsenergi
user.description: Log in to your Karlstadsenergi account. Customer number and password is recommended for most users.

data_description.auth_method: Choose customer number & password for the simplest setup. BankID is available as an alternative but requires scanning a QR code.

bankid_personnummer.title: Karlstadsenergi - BankID
bankid_personnummer.description: Enter your personnummer to start BankID authentication.

password.title: Karlstadsenergi - Login
password.description: Enter your customer number and password.

bankid.title: Karlstadsenergi - BankID
bankid.description:
Open BankID on your phone and sign in.

On your phone: [Open BankID app](bankid:///?autostarttoken={auto_start_token}&redirect=null)

After signing, click **Submit**.

select_account.title: Select account
select_account.description: Multiple accounts found. Choose which one to use.

reauth_confirm.title: Karlstadsenergi - Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Session expired for account {personnummer}. Click Submit to re-authenticate.

error.bankid_pending: BankID not yet signed. Open BankID app and try again.

init.title: Karlstadsenergi Options
init.description: Configure update settings for the Karlstadsenergi integration.

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch new data from Karlstadsenergi (1-24 hours).
